articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.title: Gigs turns your concert history into a personal live music archive - TechCrunch
articles.description: New iPhone app Gigs uses AI to turn old tickets, screenshots, and emails into a personal concert archive with stats, memories, and more.
articles.content: People always hold up their phones to record special moments at concerts, but they often never revisit those videos. Gigs, a new concert-tracking app launching this week, wants to change that. The iO… [+2569 chars]
